title: CFloorIsLava
description:
A custom Minecraft plugin that turns the game into a 'The 'Floor is Lava' challenge where the players must stay off the ground as rising lava forces fast movement, strategy, and parkour.

Gmail : contact.0c4rn4g3@gmail.com
Discord :  0c4rn4g3
body:
**FloorIsLava** is a lightweight survival mini-game plugin where lava gradually rises from the bottom of the world, challenging players to climb, survive, and adapt. Inspired by the classic playground game, this plugin adds tension and excitement to any Minecraft server.

The game begins with a **grace period** to give players time to prepare. Once the countdown ends, **lava starts rising** in a customizable circular zone from a defined center point on the map. The rise speed, affected area, and delays can all be configured easily in the plugin's settings.

Whether you're running an event, minigame server, or just want to troll your friends, FloorIsLava is simple to set up and provides tons of replayability.
